title: Witness checking wrong refinery session name (audits-refinery vs au-refinery)
description: Witness in audits rig is checking for session 'audits-refinery' but refinery uses beads prefix 'au-refinery'. This causes false escalations. Need to update witness to use correct session naming convention based on beads prefix.
